steps.title: Find the boundary line
steps.content:
The solid boundary line passes through $(0,-6)$ and $(9,0)$. Its slope is
$$\frac{0-(-6)}{9-0}=\frac{6}{9}=\frac{2}{3}$$
The $y$-intercept is $-6$, so the boundary line is
$$y=\frac{2}{3}x-6$$

steps.title: Use the shaded side
steps.content: The region is shaded above the boundary line, and the solid line means the boundary is included. That gives $$y\ge\frac{2}{3}x-6$$ The answer is A.
